mapper.select:
/* com.erns.es.login.mapper.LoginDAO.checkPasswd */ SELECT AA.MEMB_SEQ AS SEQ , AA.MEMB_ID AS USER_ID , AA.PSWD_ERR_CNT AS PSWD_ERR_CNT
, AA.PSWD_INIT_YN AS PSWD_INIT_YN
FROM T_MEMB_INF AA
AND AA.USE_YN = 'Y' AND AA.MEMB_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.PSWD = ENCODE(DIGEST(#{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || AA.SALT, 'sha512'), 'hex')
